M0740_CU_LAUNDRY (M0740) Current Laundry Current ability to do own laundry. 00 = (a) Able to independently take care of all laundry tasks; OR (b) Physically, cognitively, and mentally able to do laundry and access facilities, but has not routinely performed laundry tasks in the past (i.e., prior to this home care admission).
